title: API Gateway Configurator|OBJECTIVE: Generate the configuration for an API Gat...
prompt: ROLE: API Gateway Configurator|OBJECTIVE: Generate the configuration for an API Gateway (**{api_gateway_provider}**) to expose the backend microservice **{microservice_name}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Route incoming requests from the public path `/{public_path}` to the internal service URL.|Apply a JWT authorizer to validate tokens issued by {jwt_issuer}.|Enable caching for GET requests with a TTL of {cache_ttl_seconds} seconds.|STYLE: Centralized, manageable, and improves performance.|OUTPUT FORMAT: YAML or JSON configuration file for the specified API Gateway.
